About the Project

Shyama Enclave

Shyama Enclave is a Zilla Panchayat Approved residential project, thoughtfully situated on the Lucknow Outer Ring Road in the Jamwasi area near Ayodhya Highway — one of the fastest-developing corridors in the city. With Government approval already in place, buyers get the twin assurance of legal clarity and rapid area growth.

The project is laid out with a spacious 40-foot approach road and well-planned 30-foot internal roads, ensuring easy vehicular movement and a premium open community feel. All homes are West facing, designed to bring balanced natural light throughout the day.

The location is served by a dense network of reputed educational institutions — from Adani Gems and Study Hall to Shri Ram Swaroop University and BBD University — all within a few kilometres. Samarpan Hospital, Goel Hospital, Mati Market, and a petrol pump at just 100 metres add to the unbeatable everyday convenience.

Road connectivity is exceptional: Ayodhya–Faizabad Road in just 5 minutes, Sultanpur Road in 20 minutes, Raebareli Road in 25 minutes, and Kanpur Road in 35 minutes — keeping all of Lucknow comfortably within reach from this highly developing address.

Construction Quality

Premium Specifications — Room by Room

Every detail at Shyama Enclave is built to last. From earthquake-resistant RCC structure to JAQUAR fittings and branded electrical work — quality is non-negotiable.

Structure

  • Earthquake resistant RCC Column-Beam Structure
  • All-weather proof external paint
  • Berger Paint on inside walls

Rooms & Drawing Room

  • Vitrified Tiles flooring
  • Berger / Asian Paint on walls
  • AC wiring points in every room
  • Inverter supply provision
  • POP and False ceiling work

Bathroom

  • Anti-skid tiles on floor
  • Ceramic Glazed tiles on walls
  • JAQUAR fittings with hot water supply
  • Pedestal Basin

Kitchen

  • Anti-skid tiles on floor
  • Granite kitchen top
  • 2-foot vitrified tile dado
  • RO point provision
  • Geyser point provision

Stairs & Porch

  • Heavy-duty Granite work
  • Steel Railing
  • Dedicated Inverter space

Electrical Work

  • Branded Anchor copper wiring throughout
  • White PENTA modular switches & sockets
  • Full-house inverter wiring
  • AC point in every room & drawing room

Doors & Windows

  • Malaysian Sakhu (Teak) door frames
  • Sagwan Khidki Palla (Teak window panels)
  • Ready-made board doors
Why Choose This Project

Key Highlights

Zilla Panchayat Approved

Government-approved project offering full legal clarity and peace of mind from the moment of booking.

Outer Ring Road Location

On the Lucknow Outer Ring Road near Ayodhya Highway — one of the city's most rapidly developing corridors with strong appreciation potential.

Wide Roads

40-foot approach road and 30-foot internal roads ensure smooth traffic flow, ample parking, and a spacious, planned community layout.

Earthquake Resistant Structure

RCC Column-Beam construction with seismic resistance — built to endure and protect for generations to come.

Top Schools & Universities Nearby

Adani Gems, Study Hall, Kunwar Global, BBD University, Shri Ram Swaroop University — all within 2–4 km, making this ideal for families.

Full Inverter & AC Provision

Branded Anchor copper wiring, PENTA switches, inverter wiring throughout, and AC point in every room & drawing room included.

Premium Finishes

JAQUAR bathroom fittings, Granite kitchen tops, Vitrified tiles, Berger/Asian paint, and heavy-duty Granite stairs — no compromise on quality.

Superb Daily Connectivity

Petrol pump at 100m, Mati Market at 1km, hospitals close by — and Ayodhya Road just 5 minutes away. Everything within easy reach.
